title: Policy: Modify Policy Settings
scenario: Policy settings applied via Lens Cloud appear locked/greyed out in Poly Studio Mobile app and show a non-editable dialog when user attempts to modify them
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the target Poly device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Locate a setting that is managed by a Lens Cloud policy (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, or Audio Settings).
5. Observe that the setting control is displayed as greyed out / locked and cannot be interacted with.
6. Attempt to tap or toggle the greyed-out setting.
expected: The policy-managed setting appears greyed out and locked in the Poly Studio Mobile app. When the user attempts to change it, a dialog appears indicating the setting cannot be edited because it is managed by an IT policy.
